title: Minecraft Remastered Plus
description: This modpack adds a variety of mods that adds to the vanilla experience without altering the feel of the original game too much.
body: **Minecraft: Remastered Plus** is a Vanilla+ modpack with over 130+ mods designed to enhance your Minecraft experience without straying from the original charm of the game. This carefully curated pack adds a selection of new structures, quality-of-life improvements, and performance optimizations that seamlessly blend into the world you know and love. Dive into a refined adventure where the essence of Minecraft remains intact, but with subtle upgrades that make it feel fresh and even more enjoyable.
